dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.

public_vs_private.public_face: Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk. Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Norr Forgebound carries civic or noble weight.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Norr Forgebound presents as Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Norr Forgebound carries civic or noble weight.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep Giant Council workable through the obligations of discipline clerk while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance. Must keep status, precedent, and practical necessity from openly tearing against one another. Around Giant Council, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of discipline clerk visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must keep status, precedent, and practical necessity from openly tearing against one another. Around Giant Council, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of discipline clerk visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Discipline Clerk, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep Giant Council workable through the obligations of discipline clerk while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for extra hands on a burdened local problem, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Norr Forgebound can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Discipline Clerk too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.magic: Not explicitly stated unless separately asserted elsewhere in corpus.
capabilities.combat: Role-dependent; implied only to the degree their office already carries enforcement, survival, or defensive expectation.
capabilities.social: Measures every exchange for precedent, alignment, and the cost of appearing uncertain. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of discipline clerk in and around Giant Council, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
capabilities.logistical_economic: Keep Giant Council workable through the obligations of discipline clerk while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
capabilities.investigative_covert: Must keep status, precedent, and practical necessity from openly tearing against one another. Around Giant Council, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of discipline clerk visibly slip.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Norr Forgebound adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around Giant Council learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Norr Forgebound or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Norr Forgebound as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside Giant Council: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Norr Forgebound can propagate upward through Soreheim Alliance if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Norr Forgebound needs discreet outside help to contain political strain, prestige loss, or institutional damage before it spreads through Giant Council.
Getting entangled with Norr Forgebound can pull the party into protocol, alliance pressure, or public consequence centered on Giant Council.
Norr Forgebound can trade usable insight about Giant Council if the party solves a problem that cannot be addressed openly through the office they hold.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Giant Council: estates, audience spaces, council rooms, protocol-heavy gatherings, or civic seats

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Discipline Clerk.
rumor: People say Norr Forgebound is Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
